# Brandon Temple

Official site: https://www.brandontemple.com/

Brandon Vashun Temple, publicly branded as Brandon Temple, is a software engineer and M.S. candidate at Mississippi State University in Starkville, Mississippi.

## Primary Pages

- Portfolio: https://www.brandontemple.com/
- Resume: https://www.brandontemple.com/resume/
- Resume PDF: https://www.brandontemple.com/resume/brandon-temple-resume.pdf

## Official Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/bt1142msstate
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/brandonvtemple/

## Current Focus

- Desktop applications and internal tools
- Browser-based reporting systems
- File-processing and metadata extraction utilities
- Data export workflows
- Practical Machine Learning and address resolution

## Featured Projects

- MetaTable: Created as part of my MSU Libraries role to scan directories, collect detailed file metadata, track progress in real time, and export results to Excel.
- HTMLConverter: Windows app for converting HTML files, folders, and ZIP archives to PDF with drag-and-drop intake, scaling controls, batch processing, and automatic output archiving.
- Query: Created for MSU Libraries to create library item reports with configurable filters, structured query payloads, history tracking, and Excel export.
- Ady Resolver: Python toolkit and local browser app for resolving messy Mississippi addresses using cached public address sources, typo-heavy evaluation data, and a staged matching pipeline.
- connect4-ai: Built a playable Connect 4 app with minimax, alpha-beta pruning, replay tooling, experiment modes, and headless validation, published with a live GitHub Pages demo.

## Education

- Master of Science in Software Engineering, Mississippi State University, May 2027.
- Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, Mississippi State University, May 2024.
- Associate of Arts in Computer Science, East Central Community College, May 2021.

## Contact

Email: bt1142@msstate.edu
